20260331000100_cycle12_rls_policy_alignm.notes: Replaces legacy strict tenant RLS predicates with tenant_access_allowed() for bootstrap/admin-safe setup while preserving tenant isolation after session pinning.

Reapply the prior strict tenant RLS predicates for the affected tables.

Restore the last stable snapshot if policy rollback does not converge cleanly.
